overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with teal hair walking through Night City at night. The journey proceeds from a covered sidewalk along a busy street, through an open palm-tree-lined plaza, up a flight of stairs, and along an elevated pedestrian walkway with neon advertisements and glass railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian sidewalk adjacent to arterial road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk next to busy street with yellow safety barriers

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the road behind yellow barriers

entered.detail: bright yellow and orange traffic barriers separating pedestrian walkway from road
tall commercial building with glowing cyan and orange neon signage
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered urban sidewalk at night, with the camera following a teal-haired character walking beside a road protected by yellow barriers. Neon-lit commercial buildings line the right side while sparse traffic moves along the left. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with artificial lighting dominating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with tropical landscaping and tiered levels

events.description: exits covered sidewalk into open multi-level plaza with palm trees and red structural walls

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza, navigating around scattered pedestrians and approaching stairway

entered.detail: tall tropical palm tree in large planter, visible against city lights
reddish-brown architectural wall with geometric patterns marking plaza boundary
descending view to lower tier of the plaza with additional walkways

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the enclosed sidewalk to a spacious open plaza with wet reflective pavement. Red structural walls frame the space while palm trees rise from planter boxes. The camera moves through moderate crowds toward a distant stairway, with towering skyscrapers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: public stairway connecting plaza to elevated walkway

events.description: begins ascending wide concrete staircase to upper walkway level

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs alongside other pedestrians moving in both directions

notable_agents.action: man in leather vest walking up stairs ahead of ego character

entered.detail: wide flight of concrete stairs with textured surface leading upward
red metal handrail along left side of staircase
glass and steel structure marking the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open plaza to a enclosed concrete stairwell, ascending toward an upper level. Metal railings line the stairs as other pedestrians move up and down. The environment shifts from open sky to an artificial-lit enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings and commercial kiosks

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters covered elevated walkway with glass railings and city views

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway past digital billboards and commercial shop fronts

entered.detail: transparent glass safety barrier with metal frame overlooking lower levels
exposed structural steel framework supporting the overhead canopy
small shop front with glowing signage and merchandise displays
large vertical digital billboard displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place on an elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings offering views of the city below. The path is lined with commercial kiosks, digital advertising screens, and neon signage. The steel and glass architecture creates a semi-enclosed environment as the character continues walking through moderate pedestrian traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a sheltered sidewalk into an open plaza and finally ascends into a concrete stairwell. It begins by following a teal-haired character along a covered sidewalk, moving past yellow road barriers and glowing commercial buildings under artificial night lighting. As the path opens up, the camera glides into a spacious plaza where wet, reflective pavement mirrors the surrounding skyscrapers and palm trees rise from planter boxes amidst a moderate crowd. The scene then shifts from the open air toward a distant stairway, moving the character from the expansive plaza into the confines of a concrete stairwell. Finally, the environment closes in as the camera ascends the stairs alongside other pedestrians, shifting the perspective from the city skyline to an artificially lit enclosed space.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated pedestrian walkway that blends industrial steel architecture with vibrant commercial neon. It begins by tracking the character through a semi-enclosed environment defined by glass railings and a steady flow of pedestrian traffic. As the camera advances, the view expands to reveal the sprawling city below, framed by the sleek lines of the walkway. The scene then shifts focus toward the surrounding commercial kiosks and glowing digital advertising screens that line the path. Finally, the movement continues deeper into the neon-lit corridor, emphasizing the contrast between the cold glass structures and the vivid city lights.
